link.title: Advanced scenarios (AI)
link.description: Longer, end-to-end builds that go past CRUD into prediction and classification. No data-science background needed — start with 'Machine learning, gently' for the ideas in plain language, then 'Generate sample data' to get a sandbox you can run everything against. The SDK gets data in and out; the learning step in between is shown in Python. Each page carries an effort estimate.
